Thomas Tuchel has revealed the reasons behind Billy Gilmour starting today’s match against Fulham and why he deserved his chance.

‘Hopefully he does what he does in training,’ said our head coach. ‘That’s why he deserves to start. It is also because of the fact that we give Jorginho and N’Golo a well-deserved rest. But this is how it is as a young player, you wait for your opportunity and we put him in a position where he feels really comfortable.

‘He waited long, he worked hard for this opportunity. So I don’t want him to overdo stuff, it’s pretty exciting for him and I hope he can show what he shows in training.’
